content: SQLAlchemy async MissingGreenlet error: Occurs when code accesses a lazy-loaded relationship attribute outside an async context or after the session is closed. In FastAPI background tasks, if you pass an ORM object (e.g. TeamRecord) to the background task and then access team.members inside the task, SQLAlchemy tries to lazily load members — but the session is already closed. Prevention: (1) use selectinload() or joinedload() in the query that fetches the record, or (2) pass only scalar values (team.id, team.name) to the background task, not ORM objects. The latter is the simpler and more correct approach — background tasks should receive primitive data, not ORM objects tied to a closed session.
